title: Row value comparison malfunctions on view with left join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT, c3 BLOB);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c1 INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT t2.c0, t2.c1 FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.c0 = t3.c0;
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14, x'00FF');
key_bug_features: Row value comparison in view with left join
